label: World render step
description: One rendering pass applied when drawing a road on the world map. Each step names a layer def and the road width for that layer.

layer.label: Layer
layer.description: RoadWorldLayerDef that this step renders onto.

width.label: Width
width.description: Width of the road in this layer as a fraction of the world tile size. Typical range is 0.0 to 1.0.
